data.title: Oil surges above the dreaded $100 level as Iran-war market disruption deepens
data.description: The Iran war has forced oil producers in the Middle East to cut supply, putting further upward pressure on crude prices.
data.content:
Oil hitting $100 per barrel was increasingly being bandied about as a possibility after the Iran war started. But it wasn't supposed to happen this quickly.
